notes.hypothesis: After flashing the updated firmware and restarting the Sprout app/logger, the serial contract, raw ADC CSV fields, notebook saving, and 0.5 s experiment capture should still work against the same water-cup reference.
notes.method: Logging was stopped, the app/server was quit, stale Python processes were cleared, firmware was built and flashed through PlatformIO, then the Sprout app/logger was restarted. A 60 s experiment capture at 0.5 s cadence was run with all four probes still in the same cup of water.
notes.findings: The capture completed with 114 sweeps and 456 soil rows, matching four channels per sweep. CRC failures were 0. Readings stayed stable: medians s1 977, s2 922, s3 1007, s4 977 raw ADC with ranges of only 6-8 counts per channel.
notes.conclusion: The flashed firmware, restarted app, CSV contract, and short 0.5 s capture path were functionally verified. This is an operational validation run, not a new calibration anchor.
